decision_rationale: None of the 8 results encode the Tibetan sand mandala 4-fold ritual cycle, deity-syllable-first top-down dissolution order, center-spiral inward sweep regularization, water-reintegration parameter pool, or Anicca non-attachment basin-radius regularizer. Closest neighbors (Reset It Forget It, Crown Frame Reverse) share only isolated mechanics. All scores below thresholds. NOTE: primary scored 8 hits at sem 0.78-0.92 / func 0.78-0.92 on Basin-Like-Loss + Reset-It-Forget-It + Crown-Frame-Reverse + Flat-LoRA adjacencies; verdict-level disagreement flagged (Pattern E aggregate-adjacency vs per-paper scoring).
